knowledgeHint: Local Help/*.md articles. With EN UI chrome, matching Help/en/*.md replaces article body when present (otherwise RU). External https links open in the browser; links to other .md files stay inside the app.
knowledgeSearchTooltip: Filter the article list by title, file name, or slug (case-insensitive).
knowledgeSearchInputAria: Search articles in the table of contents
knowledgeCloseTooltip: Close help (Esc or click the backdrop).
knowledgeDialogHeaderRowAria: Knowledge base dialog title and actions
knowledgeTopbarTooltip: Open the local knowledge base (Help/*.md articles).
terminalKnowledgeDeepLinkTooltip: Open the ffmpeg / yt-dlp hints article for the Terminal tab.
knowledgeMdExternalLinkTooltip: Open link in the browser (new tab).
knowledgeDeepLinkDownloadsRailTooltip: Open the article about the downloads rail (format, network, cookies, expert).
knowledgeDeepLinkFfmpegRailTooltip: Open the article about the export rail and presets.
knowledgeDeepLinkBatchExportTooltip: Open the article about queues and batch processing.
knowledgeDeepLinkProbeTooltip: Open the article about track summary, chapters, and raw JSON.
knowledgeDeepLinkHidpiTooltip: Open the article about theme, language, and Windows display scaling.
knowledgeDeepLinkHwSmokeTooltip: Open the article about NVENC, VAAPI, and manual smoke testing.
knowledgeDeepLinkPackagedWinTooltip: Open the article about manual testing of dist/win-unpacked after a build.
